title: Admin Menu GUI
description: A simple admin menu to manage players.
body: --- ## Overview This plugin provides a simple and efficient in-game admin management panel that requires no configuration. All features are accessed through the `/admin` command. Running it opens a clean selection menu of all online players, while using `/admin ` opens that player's management panel directly. ## Commands --- **`/admin`** --- ![/admin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f0a34bf08670611f1170b17930a8a130e68592e_0.webp) **`/admin `** --- ![/admin ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32059812e3457088e164f50fd5ca75a51825e538.png) ## Features --- - Easy to use, fully in-game Gui - Change a player's current game mode - Ban or kick players instantly - Smite for quick disciplinary action - Multiple teleport options for fast movement and oversight Designed for convenience and speed, this panel keeps all essential moderation tools just a command away, allowing administrators to handle tasks smoothly without ever leaving the game. ---
